name: Furryroach
tips: Furryroach rallies a friendly minion forward when it moves. Use this to push a high-value minion closer to the enemy back row for a sacrifice threat.
At 1 mana, Furryroach is the cheapest way to accelerate board position. Play it early, move it forward, and drag an ally along.
Rally pairs well with slow, tanky minions like Fallen Paladin or Giant Rat — they get a free extra tile of forward progress each time Furryroach moves.
The rally triggers on each move, not just once. If Furryroach survives multiple turns, it can push allies across the entire board.
As an Insect with no tribal synergies yet, Furryroach is a pure utility card. Splash it into any deck that wants faster board advancement.
